name_cn:
Newly arrived 🆕 24B Autumn/Winter Collection
24B Chain Clutch Black ♥
Purchased from a counter for 40,800 RMB
A new favorite of Chanel, a clutch that's dangerously beautiful ❕
Full of design sense, simple yet elegant~
Oval handle, a perfect blend of retro and modern
Full of premium feel ✨ Every time I carry it out,
I feel like I'm walking down the Champs-Élysées in Paris 👒
Hardware: Thick 24k plated vintage gold
Leather: ZP calfskin from the cutting department
Size: 19*25*3 cm
Model: AS5038
